_note: FROZEN full-path-sim baseline. Re-baseline only intentionally (delete + rerun gen).
_rebaseline_note: Re-frozen 2026-06-10 for FIX-A wave (live-QA F2/F6/F7 composition fixes, on top of the D117 #1/#2/#3 freeze). F7 (UNGATED, sessionBuilder isBigLower now movement-token-based: squat/leg-press/lunge/deadlift/hip-thrust/good-morning on quad/ham OR tier-1): leg-press/squat stance VARIANTS now count toward MAX_BIG_LOWER_LIFTS=2, so a tier-2 wide-stance leg-press can no longer slip in as a 3rd big lift after Squat+RDL and cold-start ~80 (Daniel's live Legs bug). F2 (GATED dp_load_model_v1 LIVE, compose.ts cold-start preview): the resolveMaxKg cap now clamps the population-prior/coldstart seed BEFORE the ladder snap (previously the cap lived only in dp.recommend's at-cap brake which keys on lastW -> inert at cold-start) -> Y Raise cold-start 25->18 (his live ego-load). F6 (GATED dp_focus_policy_v1 LIVE, sessionBuilder accessory ordering): focus-relevant accessories sort ahead of off-focus within the accessory band (Pull: Pullover before Shrug/Hyperext on v-taper). hashOff shifts (F7 ungated touches OFF); hashOn shifts (F7+F2+F6). VERIFIED DETERMINISTIC (two fresh runs reproduce 054c9f7e / 09e5c3b5 within the same run; the section-A fresh-OFF-reproduces-itself test passes -> no RNG/clock leak) and SAFER: section-C is self-relative ON-vs-OFF and HOLDS, and absolute safety IMPROVED vs the D117 baseline -- craterOn 56->54, absurd ON/OFF 37->35 (F2's clamp removes cold-start absurd loads, exactly its purpose); oscillation 0=0; convergence ON 12.2% within band of OFF 12.4%. Persona-matrix #70 gate stays green. F5 (Upper 8->7) NOT applied -- the Pullover is a v-taper lat_isolation weekly-min requirement, not stray selection; dropping it blanket-style regresses pure Upper/Lower users -> deferred for a cross-day-aware fix (same class as the DARK dp_lumbar_dedup_v1).
